allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pages=d['query']['pages']; [print\(img['title']\) for p in pages.values\(\) for img in p.get\('images',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p.get\('title',''\), p.get\('imageinfo',[{}]\)[0].get\('url','NO URL'\)\) for p in d['query']['pages'].values\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p.get\('title',''\),p.get\('thumbnail',{}\).get\('source','NO IMAGE'\)\) for p in d['query']['pages'].values\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pages=d['query']['pages']; [print\(img['title']\) for p in pages.values\(\) for img in p.get\('images',[]\) if not img['title'].endswith\('.svg'\)]")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root --default-character-set=utf8mb4 user_auth -e "SELECT o.id, o.name, o.address, CASE WHEN m.objects_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'muzejs' WHEN r.objects_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'restorāns' WHEN p.objects_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'vieta' ELSE 'nav' END AS tips FROM objects o LEFT JOIN museums m ON m.objects_id = o.id LEFT JOIN restaurants r ON r.objects_id = o.id LEFT JOIN place p ON p.objects_id = o.id WHERE o.id >= 28 ORDER BY o.id;")
